channel.title: Anthony Wertz
channel.description: Roboticist, engineer, and maker. Research in soft robotics, wearable sensing, and smart materials.

item.title: Hardware for building a media player safe for kids
item.description: No ads, no video, no flashing lights, no infinite scroll, no unapproved content.

item.title: WAFFLE: Wearable bite timing for robot-assisted feeding
item.description: Best paper at HRI '26 — a wearable system for robot-assisted feeding that reads natural cues like chewing and head movement to decide when to offer the next bite, built on custom Posey IMU hardware.

item.title: Distributed strain sensing with notch filters
item.description: Soft sensor arrays using variable-frequency notch filters for spatially-distributed sensing with minimal wiring.

item.title: KidsPlay App
item.description: A fun educational app built for the little ones.

item.title: Welcome to my new site
item.description: I've migrated my portfolio from Jekyll to Astro. Here's a quick overview of what's new.

item.title: Homelab Setup
item.description: Self-hosted infrastructure, networking, and server builds.

item.title: Sensing and Locomotion Using Tunable Friction
item.description: Exploring tunable friction for robotic sensing and locomotion.

item.title: Tunable Friction Interfaces
item.description: Investigation of tunable friction materials for enhanced robotic functionality.

item.title: Continuum Bend Sencel
item.description: Sensing element for continuum bend measurement in soft robotic systems.

item.title: TEG-powered, battery-free PPG sensing
item.description: Battery-free photoplethysmograph (PPG) powered by body heat captured using flexible thermoelectric generators (TEGs).

item.title: Soft Robotic Limb Fabrication
item.description: Design and fabrication of soft robotic limbs using smart materials.

item.title: Characterizing material degradation due to ion migration
item.description: Test apparatus design for characterizing material degradation in the presence of high-voltage fields.

item.title: Posey: BLE-enabled motion tracking
item.description: A small form-factor IMU research platform designed for use in stroke rehabilitation and robotic feeding assistance.

item.title: Soft manipulator control
item.description: Soft manipulator modeling, calibration and open-loop trajectory optimization.

item.title: Data and anomaly visualization
item.description: Tool development for real-time and post-hoc data visualization and analytics.

item.title: Trauma Care in a Rucksack (TRACIR)
item.description: Automated platform for validation of closed-loop physiologic monitoring and resuscitation.

item.title: Postoperative renal failure prediction
item.description: Modeling of patient biometric data before, during, and after coronary artery bypass graft (CABG) surgery to predict a patient's likelihood of postoperative acute renal failure.

item.title: Counter human trafficking
item.description: Correlating multi-modal sex worker advertisement data to uncover and combat human trafficking.

item.title: Physiologic state clustering in shock
item.description: Unsupervised segmentation of physiologic state during crash using convolutional autoencoders.

item.title: Fast detection of hemorrhagic shock
item.description: Investigation of patient personalization and data granularity in detection of hemorrhagic shock.

item.title: Microcirculatory Bloodflow Analysis (MCBA)
item.description: Video processing and analysis to correlate changes in microcirculation with disease state.

item.title: Real-time Bayesian Aggregation (RTBA)
item.description: Real-time detection of low SNR radionuclide threats.
